@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
Although the agent correctly filtered Children's Books and reviews from 2020 onward, in execute_python it performed an exact merge on purchase_id == book_id (despite noting a "Fuzzy join"), so the differing ID formats (e.g., "purchaseid_X" vs. "bookid_X") yielded an empty join and a wrong conclusion of no qualifying titles.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@
